phase_status_rule.description: Every gate carries an implicit phase_status condition: features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'. Phases enter as 'inprogress', flip to 'completed' once their gate's other conditions pass, but the workflow does NOT auto-transition. The user (via orchestra) must trigger advancement explicitly. The condition is repeated in every gate's `conditions` array under type `phase_status_completed` for clarity.

idle_to_brainstorming.description: User has filed a new feature/bug/improvement request. Orchestra captures the intent and starts brainstorming.

conditions.description: Feature slug + initial intent recorded on the feature entry.
conditions.check: features[active_feature] exists with at least a slug, type (feature|bug|improvement), and initial_request text

conditions.description: Idle has no real work; orchestra immediately marks idle phase_status as completed when starting a new feature.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

brainstorming_to_prd_creation.description: All brainstorming questions answered, summary written, user has signed off on direction.

conditions.description: Every question in brainstorming.questions has an `answer` field set.
conditions.check: All entries in features[active_feature].brainstorming.questions[*] have answer !== null

conditions.description: Brainstorming summary captures direction and feeds the PRD.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].brainstorming.summary is a non-empty string

conditions.description: Phase marked completed by agent after summary + user sign-off.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

prd_creation_to_prd_splitting.description: Main PRD exists with required frontmatter and sections. Phase advances directly to PRD splitting (which now also handles branch creation).

conditions.description: PRD file must exist.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].prd_path exists as a file

conditions.description: PRD must have required frontmatter fields.
PRD must have required sections.

conditions.check: features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

prd_splitting_to_implementation.description: Feature branch created from base AND main PRD split into per-service PRDs.

conditions.description: Agent has: (1) checked out base (develop for api/web, development for ai-service/data-service), (2) pulled latest, (3) created <prefix><worker>/vc-<slug> from base where <prefix> is feature/ | fix/ | improvement/ per features[active_feature].type, (4) is currently on the feature branch.
conditions.check: Current branch matches (feature|fix|improvement)/<worker>/vc-<slug> AND equals features[active_feature].branch

conditions.description: Service PRDs must exist for each touched service.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].service_prds has entries for all services listed in main PRD frontmatter
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

implementation_to_pr_submission.description: Sequential flow only (Cursor/OpenCode and the default Claude Code flow). Agent Teams skips pr_submission/pr_review.

conditions.description: Track file must show progress.
conditions.check: At least one task checked off in each service's track file

conditions.description: Must be on feature branch.
conditions.check: Current branch matches (feature|fix|improvement)/<worker>/vc-<slug> AND equals features[active_feature].branch

conditions.description: Must be using sequential strategy.
conditions.check: agent_teams is null OR agent_teams.strategy === 'sequential'
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

implementation_to_completion.description: Agent Teams flow only (Claude Code). Engineers handle their own PRs — skip pr_submission/pr_review.

conditions.description: Must be using agent_teams strategy.
conditions.check: agent_teams.strategy === 'agent_teams'

conditions.description: All engineers must report done.
conditions.check: Every entry in agent_teams.engineers has status === 'done'

conditions.description: All service PRs must exist and be merged.
conditions.check: Every service in pr_urls has a URL and `gh pr view` returns 'MERGED'
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

pr_submission_to_pr_review.description: PR is open and has reviewer or bot feedback (comments, change requests, or failing automated checks). Self code-review and security audit must have already passed during pr_submission.

conditions.description: frndos-pr's self code-review must be recorded as passed in the PR body.
conditions.check: PR body contains a self-review section with no must-fix items

conditions.description: security-reviewer skill audit must be recorded as passed in the PR body.
conditions.check: PR body contains a security audit section with no high/critical findings

conditions.description: PR URLs must be recorded and exist on GitHub.
conditions.check: features[active_feature].pr_urls has at least one entry and `gh pr view` succeeds for each

conditions.description: PR has at least one open review thread, change request, or failing check.
conditions.check: `gh pr view --json reviewDecision,comments,reviews` shows reviewDecision === 'CHANGES_REQUESTED' OR any unresolved review thread OR any open review comment
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

pr_submission_to_completion.description: PR merged with zero reviewer or bot feedback. Bypasses pr_review.

conditions.check: PR body contains a self-review section with no must-fix items
PR body contains a security audit section with no high/critical findings

conditions.description: All PRs must be MERGED.
conditions.check: `gh pr view --json state` returns 'MERGED' for all entries in pr_urls

conditions.description: PR has zero review comments and zero change requests across its lifetime.
conditions.check: `gh pr view --json comments,reviews` shows no comments and no reviews with state CHANGES_REQUESTED or COMMENTED
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

pr_review_to_completion.description: All review threads resolved and PR merged.

conditions.description: Every review thread has resolution.
conditions.check: `gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pulls/{n}/reviews` shows zero unresolved threads

conditions.description: All PRs must be merged.
conditions.check: `gh pr view --json state` returns 'MERGED' for all entries in pr_urls
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'

conditions.description: Track file must be marked complete.
conditions.check: Track file frontmatter has status: completed
features[active_feature].phase_status === 'completed'
